# Agent Resources (agr)

> A package manager for AI agent skills. Install, share, and run skills across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Copilot, and Antigravity with a single command.

For the complete documentation in a single file, see [llms-full.txt](https://agentskills.io/llms-full.txt).

## Quick Start

```bash
uv tool install agr
agr add anthropics/skills/frontend-design
```

Run once without installing:

```bash
agrx anthropics/skills/pdf -p "Extract tables from report.pdf"
```

## Documentation Map

### Getting Started
- [Home](https://agentskills.io/) — Install agr, add your first skill, and see what's available
- [Tutorial](https://agentskills.io/tutorial/) — Step-by-step guide from install to sharing your own skill
- [Core Concepts](https://agentskills.io/concepts/) — How skills, handles, sources, and scopes work

### Guides
- [Supported Tools](https://agentskills.io/tools/) — Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Copilot, Antigravity
- [Skill Directory](https://agentskills.io/skills/) — Browse official and community skills
- [Teams](https://agentskills.io/teams/) — Set up agr for a team with shared skills and CI/CD
- [Configuration](https://agentskills.io/configuration/) — Multi-tool setup, custom sources, instruction syncing
- [agrx](https://agentskills.io/agrx/) — Run skills ephemerally without installing

### Building Skills
- [Creating Skills](https://agentskills.io/creating/) — Write, test, and publish AI agent skills
- [Python SDK](https://agentskills.io/sdk/) — Use agr as a library to load and inspect skills

### Reference
- [CLI Reference](https://agentskills.io/reference/) — Every command, flag, and config option
- [Troubleshooting](https://agentskills.io/troubleshooting/) — Common errors and how to fix them
- [What's New](https://agentskills.io/changelog/) — Release notes and breaking changes

## Common Commands

```bash
agr add user/skill         # Install from GitHub
agr add user/repo/skill    # From a specific repo
agr add ./path/to/skill    # Local path
agr remove user/skill      # Uninstall
agr sync                   # Install all dependencies from agr.toml
agr list                   # Show installed skills
agr init                   # Create agr.toml (auto-detects tools)
agr init my-skill          # Scaffold a new skill
agrx user/skill            # Run a skill temporarily
agrx user/skill -i         # Run, then continue chatting
```

## Handle Format

```
user/skill              → github.com/user/skills repo, "skill" directory
user/repo/skill         → github.com/user/repo repo, "skill" directory
./path/to/skill         → local directory on disk
```

## Source Code

- GitHub: https://github.com/kasperjunge/agent-resources
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agr/
- Skills Specification: https://agentskills.io/specification
- Example Skills: https://github.com/anthropics/skills
